instruction: <RETAIL>You are Aarav Anderson, residing in Philadelphia 19031. You mistakenly ordered a Wireless Earbud with an IPX7 water resistance level, but you don't require this feature. You wish to exchange it for one with the same water resistance level as the other Wireless Earbuds that you've purchased. In fact, you want to exchange it to the cheapest earbud item from the rest of that order. Please be polite and concise, yet assertive.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: mistakenly ordered a Wireless Earbud with an IPX7 water resistance level
dialogue_state.initial_query: Accidentally ordered a Wireless Earbud with IPX7 water resistance

hints.segment: wish to exchange for one with the same water resistance level as the other Wireless Earbuds purchased
hints.hint: I would like to exchange it for an earbud with the same water resistance as my other Wireless Earbuds

hints.segment: exchange to the cheapest earbud item from the rest of that order
hints.hint: Please make the exchange for the cheapest eligible earbud from that order

hints.segment: do not require IPX7 water resistance
hints.hint: I do not need the IPX7 water resistance feature
The order is under the name Aarav Anderson
